description_long: This object is a whole, fresh cucumber with a long, cylindrical shape and a slightly curved form. Its surface is a vibrant, glossy green with subtle, lighter green striations running lengthwise along the skin. The ends are rounded, with one end slightly more tapered than the other, and the skin appears smooth but with faint, natural ridges. The cucumber's exterior is unblemished, indicating freshness, and the overall size suggests it is a standard variety commonly found in grocery stores or markets. The object is solid and firm, with a moist, pale green interior that is not visible from the outside. There are no visible stickers, labels, or artificial markings on the surface.
description: A fresh, whole cucumber with a glossy green, slightly curved exterior and subtle lengthwise striations. The surface is smooth and unblemished, with rounded ends.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length and gentle curvature of the cucumber, highlighting its smooth, glossy green skin.
description_view_1: End-on view displaying the rounded, slightly tapered tip and the cylindrical cross-section of the cucumber.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the full length and curvature, with visible striations and a consistent green color.
description_view_3: End-on view from the opposite end, showing the rounded tip and the cylindrical shape, with subtle surface ridges.
attribute_location: isolated in space with an undefined background
attribute_visible_markings: subtle lengthwise striations, no visible markings
